name: Analytics
description: First-party traffic analytics (port of q9's analytics app): an append-mode page_views collection fed by a server-side capture hook (object_analytics), one row per non-asset request -- path/method/status/ip/user_agent/referrer/session/is_owner. Live traffic + bot-attack visibility (4xx and /api hits ARE captured on purpose), and a rollup source for dashboards. Capture is off unless DBBASIC_ANALYTICS is set (per-request write is an operator choice); admin-read only, closed to the generic write surface. Bounded by the daemon's time-windowed retention pass (DBBASIC_ANALYTICS_RETENTION_DAYS, default 30) -- the platform's heaviest write path and the stress test for massive-file rotation. No pages: the shell/dashboard + rollups are the surface.
